title: Pleuridium angustatum
intro: Pleuridium angustatum, also known as narrow-leaved pleuridium, is a species of moss that belongs to the family Ditrichaceae. The health benefits of Pleuridium angustatum include its potential to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health issues. Pleuridium angustatum is typically used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being incorporated into traditional medicine formulas, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
taxonomy: Pleuridium angustatum is classified as a species of liverwort, belonging to the family Pallaviciniaceae. It is a type of non-vascular plant that grows in dense, green mats. The plant is a part of the division Marchantiophyta, which includes all liverworts and hornworts. Liverworts are a group of small, leafy plants that are typically found in damp environments.
